name: ai-bridge
title: AI Bridge
description: Expose Raycast AI as a local OpenAI-compatible HTTP endpoint
author: seancrooks

commands.name: manage
commands.title: AI Bridge — Manage
commands.subtitle: Toggle · Models · Endpoint URL
commands.description: Turn the bridge on/off, scan available AI models, select which to expose, and copy the endpoint URL.

commands.name: process
commands.title: AI Bridge — Background
commands.description: Runs silently in the menu bar, processing AI requests in the background. No window activation.

preferences.name: port
preferences.title: HTTP Port
preferences.description: Local port the bridge server listens on (default 3099)
